care.summary: Compact shrub with umbrella-like leaflets; tolerates low light and infrequent watering.
care.light: Bright indirect light to low light
care.water: Water when top inch of soil is dry; avoid overwatering
care.fertilizer: Monthly during growing season with balanced liquid fertilizer
common_issues: Leaf drop from sudden temperature changes
tips: Wipe leaves occasionally to remove dust
Prune to maintain shape and encourage bushiness
Rotate plant periodically for even growth
